sent_posts.post: Volatility in the Indian markets has cooled significantly, with the India VIX seeing a sharp drop. Markets rose for the third straight day as investors focus on Q4 earnings and the ongoing election season. For information only. #StockMarket #India

Grasim Industries led the Nifty gainers today as markets ended slightly higher. Being a diversified player in cement and chemicals, its movement reflects ongoing stock-specific focus during the Q4 results season. For information only. #Stocks #Grasim
